title: Brave at Bedtime
lesson: The dark isn't scary when you feel cozy and safe; you can be brave.
prompts: Place the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image into a cozy child's bedroom in the evening — a comfy bed, a small teddy bear — sitting up on the bed and hugging the teddy bear, looking a little unsure about the dark. Medium shot at eye level, the person facing the camera with their face fully visible and well-lit. A soft warm glow fills the room, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a cozy child's bedroom in the evening — a comfy bed, a small teddy bear — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits on the far left in the mid-ground on the bed, facing the camera with their face clearly visible and a slightly worried expression, still hugging the teddy bear. In the right foreground, {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} kneels beside the bed reaching toward a small night-light, smiling warmly and reassuringly. Eye-level medium-wide shot, gentle warm light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a cozy child's bedroom in the evening — a comfy bed, a small teddy bear — now softly lit by a glowing night-light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits on the far left on the bed, facing the camera with their face fully visible and a calmer expression, hugging the teddy bear. On the right, {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} leans in tucking a soft blanket around them, smiling gently. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm glowing light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

Place the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image alone in a cozy child's bedroom in the evening — a comfy bed, a small teddy bear — lying back on the pillow with the teddy bear beside them, the head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible and softly lit by the warm glowing night-light. The room is cozy and warm, the child feeling calmer, gentle eye-level medium shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

Place the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image alone in a cozy child's bedroom in the evening — a comfy bed, a small teddy bear — snuggling down under the blanket and hugging the teddy bear with a small brave smile, the head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible and warmly lit by the glowing night-light. Gentle eye-level medium shot, warm glowing light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

Place the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image alone in a cozy child's bedroom in the evening — a comfy bed, a small teddy bear — resting peacefully on the pillow with the teddy bear tucked close and a content, peaceful expression, no longer afraid of the dark. The head is turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible, softly and warmly lit by the glowing night-light. Gentle eye-level medium shot, warm glowing light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
texts: It was bedtime. You sat up in bed hugging your teddy, feeling unsure about the dark.
"I'm a little bit scared," you said. Dad knelt down and switched on a soft, glowing night-light.
The room filled with a warm, cosy glow. Dad tucked your blanket in snug and gave you a smile.
You lay back on your pillow with teddy beside you. The dark didn't feel so scary now.
You snuggled down and gave a brave little smile. "I can be brave," you whispered.
Soon you rested, calm and cosy, not afraid at all. You were safe, and you were brave.
